brand.name: Dr. Dental
brand.heading: Healthy smiles for every age, from first tooth to forever care.
brand.description: From preventive checkups to cosmetic and advanced procedures, Pearl Dental delivers comfortable, high-quality treatment with a patient-first approach.
brand.footer_desc: Gentle, modern, and family-focused dental care for every smile. We believe in creating lasting relationships through exceptional care.

services_heading.title: Dental services tailored to your smile goals
services_heading.subtitle: Comprehensive care designed around your comfort and long-term oral health.

services.title: Comprehensive Checkup
services.description: Routine dental examination, cleaning, and preventative care to keep your smile healthy.

services.title: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional teeth whitening services for a brighter, more confident smile.

services.title: Orthodontics
services.description: Clear aligners and traditional braces to straighten teeth and correct bites.

services.title: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent replacements for missing teeth that look and function like natural teeth.

services.title: Root Canal Treatment
services.description: Relieve tooth pain and save your natural tooth with our comfortable treatments.

services.title: Pediatric Dentistry
services.description: Gentle and friendly dental care tailored specifically for children's oral health.

testimonials.quote: "The staff here is incredibly friendly and professional. I used to be terrified of the dentist, but they made me feel completely at ease. Highly recommend!"
testimonials.author: Sarah Jenkins

testimonials.quote: "Got my teeth whitened here before my wedding. The results were fantastic, and the process was quick and painless. Dr. Smith is great."
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.quote: "Brought my two kids in for their first checkup. The pediatric team was wonderful and patient. My kids actually enjoyed their visit!"
testimonials.author: Amanda Rivera

testimonials.quote: "Had to get a root canal and was dreading it, but it went smoothly. Zero pain the next day. They really know what they are doing."
testimonials.author: James Thompson
